sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17288" key="a)/tuktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄτυκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17288.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">undone,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐκέτι γὰρ δύναται τὸ τετυγμένον εἶναι ἄτυκτον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
